'''Grove Fry''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the father of [[Talesan Fry]]. He was killed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Magus (bounty hunter)|Magus]] along with his wife [[Nelia Fry|Nelia]].

==Appearances==
*[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
